name: Blue Diodebot
tips: Blue Diodebot tutors Red Diodebot, completing the cycle. At 14🗡️/8🤍 it's the most aggressive Diodebot — the highest 🗡️ but the lowest 🤍 of the chain.
Blue is the glass cannon of the chain. Play it when you need damage output, not when you need a blocker.

The tutor chain means drawing any single Diodebot eventually gets you all three. Blue completing the cycle back to Red keeps the loop going for as long as your deck still holds copies — dead Diodebots go to the graveyard and can't be tutored back.
Discard Blue and another Robot for RGB Lasercannon's cost — Blue's fragile stats make it a better discard target than the tankier Green.
At 14🗡️ for 2 mana, Blue trades up into 3-mana minions. Use it aggressively — the tutor chain keeps refilling your hand from the deck while copies last.
rulings: Summon: Tutor searches the caster's deck for Red Diodebot and adds it to hand. Picker modal shows every Red in deck as a match.
If no Red Diodebot is in deck, the tutor silently does nothing — no modal, no toast.

The tutor pick happens through the standard pending_tutor flow and is MANDATORY — you must TUTOR_SELECT while a match exists (a full hand does not let you decline). If your hand is full (10 cards) when the pick resolves, the tutored card BURNS to the Exhaust Pile revealed instead of entering your hand — the same rule as every other draw path.
Chain order: Red → Green → Blue → Red (cycles indefinitely as long as you keep drawing and playing Diodebots).
